name: AkroStar Technology Co., Ltd. Akrostar
message: www.akrostar-tech.com AkroStar was founded in June 2020 and is a leading Chinese enterprise specializing in advanced interface IP. We are committed to the research and development of domestically produced advanced interface IP and breaking through “bottleneck” technologies. AkroStar offers comprehensive high-speed interface IP solutions, including PCIe, Serdes, DDR, D2D, USB, MIPI, HDMI, SATA, SD/eMMC, etc., covering a full-stack complete IP solution compliant with the latest protocol standards. https://www.crunchbase.com/organization/akrostar
